channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Liberals' Shift in Attitude Toward Trump Amidst War Policies
item.description: The article discusses how the liberal establishment has become significantly less critical of Donald Trump during his second term compared to his first. This shift is attributed to Trump's actions, su...

item.title: Cyclosporiasis Outbreak Linked to Contaminated Lettuce Hospitalizes Bride on Honeymoon
item.description: A recent outbreak of cyclosporiasis has raised concerns across the United States, with at least one case involving a newlywed bride hospitalized during her honeymoon. The illness, caused by the Cyclos...

item.title: Multi-departmental Operation Targets Durban CBD Building Linked to Crime and Illegal Activities
item.description: Authorities in Durban conducted a multi-departmental operation targeting a notorious building in the city centre known for criminal activities including drug use and prostitution. The operation, spear...

item.title: CJI's Remarks Spark Protests as Youth Movement Gains Momentum
item.description: The article discusses the renewed attention on Chief Justice of India Surya Kant's controversial remark from mid-May, where he referred to jobless youth as 'cockroaches' and 'parasites'. This comment ...

item.title: UEFA President Ceferin Withdraws from World Cup Final Over Disputes with FIFA
item.description: UEFA President Aleksander Ceferin refused to attend the World Cup final due to ongoing disputes with FIFA over disciplinary procedures, refereeing logistics, and match operations. A key issue was FIFA...

item.title: Comedy Troupe Interrupts Limp Bizkit Concert with Super Troopers Costumes
item.description: Broken Lizard, a renowned comedy troupe, made an unexpected appearance at Limp Bizkit's concert during the Summer Of ’99 And Beyond Festival in Illinois. Dressed as Vermont state troopers from their c...

item.title: Mike D Announces Expanded 2026 Solo Tour with UK Dates and Mutations Festival Headlining
item.description: Mike D, member of the Beastie Boys, has announced additional UK dates for his 2026 solo tour, including a headline performance at the Mutations Festival in Brighton alongside Fat Dog. The tour follows...

item.title: Teenager faces charges after alleged school arson incident
item.description: A teenage boy has been formally charged following allegations that he set fire to a school in NSW's Central West and filmed the act on social media. The incident, which occurred on July 21, 2026, has ...

item.title: Former England Captain Kevin Keegan Passes Away at 75, Leaving Lasting Legacy
item.description: Kevin Keegan, a former England captain and manager, passed away at 75 after a battle with cancer. His family and Newcastle United confirmed his death, marking the end of a glittering career that spann...

item.title: News Corp Australia blocks crawler bots with access restrictions
item.description: The article discusses News Corp Australia's measures to manage crawler bot traffic on their websites. Users encountering a block message as a reader or subscriber are advised to disable AdBlockers, ad...

item.title: India Suspends Indus Waters Treaty Over Pakistan's Terror Support and Water Disputes
item.description: The Indus Waters Treaty, a 1960 agreement between India and Pakistan for sharing river waters, is being suspended due to Pakistan's continued support for cross-border terrorism. India has halted the t...

item.title: Dollar Tree Closes 75 Stores Amid Expansion Plans
item.description: Dollar Tree, a popular discount retailer, announced plans to close approximately 75 underperforming stores nationwide during fiscal 2026 while simultaneously expanding its physical presence by opening...

item.title: Government Seizes R326 Million in Assets Linked to Maumela Corruption Case
item.description: Justice and Constitutional Development Minister Mmamoloko Kubayi has commended the Johannesburg High Court's decision to forfeit assets valued at approximately R326 million linked to the Maumela case....

item.description: Nigeria's legal sector has achieved a major milestone with four women assuming top roles across key institutions. Justice Kudirat Kekere-Ekun leads as Chief Justice of Nigeria, while Justice Monica Do...

item.title: China's Urban Renewal Projects Enhance Livability
item.description: Urban renewal initiatives across China are transforming aging communities into vibrant, livable spaces. Projects like the Beiyuanercun residential community in Nanjing and the Suzhou River area in Sha...

item.title: Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey' Faces Criticism Over Character Portrayal and Casting Choices
